name: 38_Object_Tracking_Siamese_OTB50_DL
query: Nahitaji kuunda mfumo wa kufuatilia vitu kwa kutumia mtandao wa Siamese na seti ya data ya OTB50. Seti ya data ya OTB50 inapaswa kupakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`. Mfumo unapaswa kujumuisha hatua za kuongeza data kama vile mzunguko na kupanua, zinazofanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`. Tekeleza mtandao wa Siamese katika `src/model.py`. Hyperparameters, kama vile kiwango cha kujifunza na ukubwa wa kundi, zinapaswa kurekebishwa katika `src/train.py`. Matokeo ya ufuatiliaji yanapaswa kuhifadhiwa kama `results/tracking_results.txt`. Onyesha matokeo ya ufuatiliaji kwa kutumia OpenCV na hifadhi video za ufuatiliaji chini ya `results/videos/`. Zaidi ya hayo, tengeneza ripoti kamili ya Markdown inayojumuisha maelezo ya usindikaji wa data, mafunzo ya modeli, na mchakato wa tathmini na ihifadhi kama `results/object_tracking_report.md`. Hakikisha mfumo unaweza kushughulikia mfuatano mpya wa video kwa marekebisho madogo kwa matumizi rahisi. Ripoti ya Markdown inapaswa kujumuisha sehemu inayochambua athari za hyperparameters tofauti kwenye utendaji wa ufuatiliaji.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "OTB50" inapakuliwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Kuongeza data, kama vile mzunguko na kupanua, kunafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Hyperparameters, kama vile kiwango cha kujifunza na ukubwa wa kundi, zinarekebishwa katika `src/train.py`.
Matokeo ya ufuatiliaji yanaonyeshwa kwa kutumia OpenCV na kuhifadhiwa katika `results/videos/`.
Hati ya kina ya Markdown inayojumuisha usindikaji wa data, mafunzo ya modeli, na michakato ya tathmini inatengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/object_tracking_report.md`.
Ripoti ya Markdown inapaswa kujumuisha sehemu inayochambua athari za hyperparameters tofauti kwenye utendaji wa ufuatiliaji.

preferences.criteria: Video za ufuatiliaji zinapaswa kuhifadhiwa katika azimio la juu na kujumuisha maelezo yanayoonyesha kitu kinachofuatiliwa.
Hakikisha mfumo una uwezo wa kushughulikia mfuatano mpya wa video kwa marekebisho madogo, kuruhusu matumizi rahisi.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "OTB50" inapakuliwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not actually load the OTB50 dataset. It only contains a placeholder function `load_dataset()` that returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` without any real implementation of loading OTB50 data. There is no code to download, read, or process actual OTB50 dataset files (e.g., no file paths, no image/annotation loading, no directory traversal). The file merely lists OTB50 as a keyword in `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` and `KEYWORDS` arrays, which is not equivalent to actually loading the dataset.

judge_stats.criteria: Kuongeza data, kama vile mzunguko na kupanua, kunafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file contains only a placeholder function `build_transforms()` that returns a simple list `["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]` — this is not a real implementation of data augmentation. There is no actual use of libraries like `torchvision.transforms` or any other augmentation framework to perform rotation, scaling, or other transformations on real data. The file explicitly states it is a "Minimal semantic implementation" and "placeholder," meaning no genuine data augmentation is implemented.

<UNSATISFIED>: The `src/model.py` file does not implement an actual Siamese network. Instead, it contains only a placeholder/stub implementation with metadata strings (`REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`, `KEYWORDS`) and a `build_model()` function that returns a string placeholder ("model placeholder"). There is no actual neural network architecture defined — no layers, no forward pass, no PyTorch/TensorFlow modules, and no Siamese-specific components (e.g., twin branches, shared weights, similarity metric). The file is essentially a fake/minimal semantic stub created for benchmark judging purposes, not a real Siamese network implementation.

judge_stats.criteria: Hyperparameters, kama vile kiwango cha kujifunza na ukubwa wa kundi, zinarekebishwa katika `src/train.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/train.py` file is a minimal semantic stub that does not contain any hyperparameter definitions or tuning. There is no learning rate, batch size, optimizer configuration, or any other training hyperparameters defined or adjusted in the code. The `train()` function simply iterates over a range and accumulates a sum score — it has no connection to actual model training. The file explicitly states it is a "Minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" and only creates placeholder artifact files.

<UNSATISFIED>: Faili `results/tracking_results.txt` ipo katika muundo wa mradi, lakini maudhui yake ni `('placeholder\r\n', None)` - ambayo ni thamani ya placeholder tu, si matokeo halisi ya ufuatiliaji. Hakuna data ya kweli ya tracking (kama vile bounding boxes, scores, au frame-by-frame results) iliyohifadhiwa. Pia, kumbukumbu ya vitendo haina rekodi yoyote ya uandishi au uhifadhi wa matokeo halisi katika faili hiyo, ikionyesha kwamba mfumo wa ufuatiliaji haukufanya kazi ipasavyo.

judge_stats.criteria: Matokeo ya ufuatiliaji yanaonyeshwa kwa kutumia OpenCV na kuhifadhiwa katika `results/videos/`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The code files (`data_loader.py`, `model.py`, `train.py`) contain only minimal placeholder implementations with no OpenCV usage whatsoever. There is no code that visualizes tracking results or saves video files using OpenCV. The `results/videos/` directory exists in the project structure but is empty — no video files are saved there. The `train.py` only creates `results/tracking_results.txt` and `results/object_tracking_report.md` as placeholder text files, with no video output logic. No OpenCV (`cv2`) import or video writing functionality (e.g., `cv2.VideoWriter`) is present anywhere in the codebase.

judge_stats.criteria: Hati ya kina ya Markdown inayojumuisha usindikaji wa data, mafunzo ya modeli, na michakato ya tathmini inatengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/object_tracking_report.md`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/object_tracking_report.md` exists but its content is merely `('placeholder', None)` — a Python tuple representation, not a comprehensive Markdown document. It contains no actual documentation of data processing, model training, or evaluation processes. The trajectory evidence also confirms that no steps were recorded for properly generating or saving this report file.

judge_stats.criteria: Ripoti ya Markdown inapaswa kujumuisha sehemu inayochambua athari za hyperparameters tofauti kwenye utendaji wa ufuatiliaji.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The Markdown report file (`results/object_tracking_report.md`) is generated by `train.py`'s `save_expected_artifacts()` function, but it only writes the placeholder text `'generated by minimal semantic train.py\n'`. There is no actual analysis of hyperparameter effects on tracking performance. The `train.py` file itself contains no hyperparameter tuning logic, no experiments with different learning rates or batch sizes, and no results to analyze. The trajectory evidence also confirms that no steps related to hyperparameter analysis or reporting were executed.
